description_long: This coupe car features a sleek, aerodynamic body with a low stance and aggressive lines, highlighted by a striking combination of black, red, and blue exterior colors. The front end is characterized by a wide grille, sharp headlights, and a sculpted hood with blue racing stripes that continue over the roof and rear. The side profile reveals two doors, blacked-out wheels, and a prominent blue diagonal stripe cutting through the red bodywork, emphasizing its sporty nature. The rear showcases a compact trunk, dual exhausts, and a continuation of the blue racing stripes, with a subtle lip spoiler integrated into the trunk lid. The windows are tinted and the roofline is smooth and continuous, typical of a hardtop coupe. Overall, the car exudes a performance-oriented, urban-ready aesthetic with premium detailing.
description: A sporty, low-profile coupe car with black, red, and blue racing stripes, two doors, and a sleek hardtop roofline. Its aggressive styling and premium details make it stand out in urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide grille, sharp headlights, and blue racing stripes running over the hood.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the two-door configuration, black wheels, and a bold blue diagonal stripe on the red body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the compact trunk, dual exhausts, and blue racing stripes continuing over the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with the blue diagonal stripe and sleek coupe silhouette clearly visible.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
